page_metadata.biotools__summary: Automated tool to quantify stochastic cell state transitions between distinct cell states from FACS and flow cytometry experiments, to estimate equilibrium cell state proportions and the needed time equilibrium.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Automated tool to quantify stochastic cell state transitions between distinct cell states from FACS and flow cytometry experiments, to estimate equilibrium cell state proportions and the needed time equilibrium.
